prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes that control service account token auto-mounting: the admission controller that injects tokens, the pod spec validation that checks automountServiceAccountToken, and the token controller that creates secrets.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the kubernetes-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes that control service account token auto-mounting: the admission controller that injects tokens, the pod spec validation that checks automountServiceAccountToken, and the token controller that creates secrets.
